请求图片的format
FORMAT_ARGB_8888 - 类 中的静态变量me.chan.texas.image.ImageLoader
should return Bitmap.Config#ARGB_8888 for Bitmap.getConfig() when possible.
FORMAT_RGB_565 - 类 中的静态变量me.chan.texas.image.ImageLoader
Bitmaps decoded from image formats that support and/or use alpha (some types of PNGs, GIFs etc) should return Bitmap.Config#ARGB_8888 for Bitmap.getConfig().
